ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Havells India Limited announced the appointment of Mr. Ashish Parikh as President & SBU Head, effective July 16, 2026. Mr. Parikh brings over 25 years of extensive leadership experience in P&L management, sales, and strategy from prominent consumer goods companies like Diageo, Reckitt, and PepsiCo. This strategic senior management appointment is expected to strengthen Havells' business units and drive growth, with no apparent red flags.
